heroDescription.processed: Heartland Community Foundation brings together donors, nonprofits, and community leaders to address our region's most pressing needs. Through strategic grantmaking, donor services, and community leadership, we help build a stronger, more equitable community for generations to come.

ctaDescription.processed: Whether you want to establish a fund, make a gift, or include the foundation in your estate plans, our team can help you create a lasting philanthropic legacy that reflects your values and vision.
ctaDescription.summary: Whether you want to establish a fund, make a gift, or include the foundation in your estate plans, our team can help you create a lasting philanthropic legacy that reflects your values and vision.
